description: Root-knot nematode parasitizing tomato → plant-pathologist (nematology), not entomology. [Pass-13 fix]
Arbuscular mycorrhiza with maize → soil-scientist, even though a fungus is named.
Above-ground aphid herbivory on cabbage (no soil terms) → entomologist.

Aphid herbivory whose notes mention soil nitrogen → SHOULD be entomologist, but SOIL_TERM_RE (checked before the arthropod-interaction branch) currently grabs it for soil-scientist. Documented backlog misroute.

payload.notes: sustained feeding reduces soil nitrogen uptake by the crop
